mapper.sql: id, user_id, reward_type, reward_id, points_granted, granted_at, remark
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_reward_grant_log (user_id, reward_type, reward_id, points_granted, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{rewardType}, #{rewardId}, #{pointsGranted}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_reward_grant_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY granted_at DESC
